steps.title: Translate 'twice the number of notebooks that Maya has'
steps.content:
Maya has n notebooks. The phrase twice the number means multiply by 2. So twice the number of notebooks that Maya has is:
$$2n$$

steps.title: Add '4 more' and identify the answer
steps.content:
Leon has 4 more than that amount. The phrase 4 more than means add 4:
$$2n + 4$$
That matches the correct answer — D is correct.
